leadText: Mach Punch (Japanese: マッハパンチ Mach Punch) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation II. Prior to Generation III, it was the signature move of Hitmonchan, but Tyrogue could still inherit it via breeding.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Mach Punch inflicts damage. It has a priority of +1, so it is used before all moves that do not have increased priority. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad2 An incredibly fast punch that always lands first. G S C A fast punch that lands first. R S E Colo XD A punch is thrown at wicked speed to strike first. FR LG A punch thrown at blinding speed. It is certain to strike first. D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 The user throws a punch at blinding speed. It is certain to strike first. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first. LA The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This also raises the user's action speed. ZA The user attacks by throwing a punch with blinding speed.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on a target up to two tiles ahead. MD T D S Inflicts damage on a target up to 2 tiles away. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる ２マスまで とどく MD GtI UNUSED S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It reaches up to 2 tiles away.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move originated as a TCG attack .
